title: Baby Support Grant
text:
Baby Support Grant - SupportGoWhere
Baby Support Grant
Share link
Help parents ease financial concerns about raising a child during extraordinary times.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
One-off cash payout of $3,000 for eligible Singaporean children
Extended to eligible Singaporean children born from 1 Oct 2022 to 13 Feb 2023
No application needed if you have applied for Baby Bonus Scheme previously
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligible Singaporean children born from 1 Oct 2022 to 13 Feb 2023 qualify for the one-off cash payout of $3,000. The Grant will be disbursed from the second half of 2023.

Who is this for?

Child is a Singapore Citizen

Children born from 1 Oct 2022 to 13 Feb 2023

Parents are lawfully married

Children who are already receiving the Baby Bonus Cash Gift are also eligible for the Baby Support Grant.

How to apply?

No application needed if you have applied for Baby Bonus Scheme previously.

From 1 July 2024, improvements to Baby Bonus services were made easier for parents for Baby Bonus application and accounts related services:

All parents can apply for Baby Bonus Scheme at LifeSG:

Bundled service together with child’s birth registration

Direct application for child who has already registered for birth

Where can I find help?

Baby Bonus Scheme | LifeSG

MSF Consolidated hotline: 1800 111 2222

Operating hours: Mon to Fri 8.30am to 6pm | Saturday: 8.30am to 1pm
(Closed on Public Holidays)

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.
Scheme last updated 10 Dec 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
